zh.lifeSummary: Sancho Pérez de Ayala是Pedro Lopez de Ayala和Elvira Sanchez de Gamboa的兒子，於1246年出生。他於1277年與Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1288年在西班牙拉 利奧亞阿爾法羅享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sancho Pérez de Ayala是Pedro Lopez de Ayala和Elvira Sanchez de Gamboa的儿子，于1246年出生。他于1277年与Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1288年在西班牙拉 利奧亞阿爾法羅享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ayala
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Carlos, Manuel, Jesus, Miguel, Pedro, Francisco, Raul, Jorge, Rafael.
Basque: Castilianized form of Aiala, habitational or topographic name from ai ‘slope, hillside’ + al(h)a ‘pasture’.

nameMeanings.name: Sancho
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin, perhaps from Latin sanctus ‘holy’. It will always be associated with Sancho Panza , Don Quixote's companion.

en.lifeSummary: Sancho Pérez de Ayala was born in 1246 as the son of Pedro Lopez de Ayala and Elvira Sanchez de Gamboa. He married Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri in 1277, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1288, in Alfaro, La Rioja, Spain, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Sancho Pérez de Ayala est né en 1246, fils de Pedro Lopez de Ayala et Elvira Sanchez de Gamboa. Il a épousé Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri en 1277, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1288, à Alfaro, La Rioja, Espagne, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sancho Pérez de Ayala wurde 1246, als Sohn von Pedro Lopez de Ayala und Elvira Sanchez de Gamboa geboren. Er hat 1277 in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1288 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Alfaro, La Rioja, Spanien.

it.lifeSummary: Sancho Pérez de Ayala è nato il nel 1246 come figlio di Pedro Lopez de Ayala e Elvira Sanchez de Gamboa. Lui sposato Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri nel 1277, nel Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1288, nel Alfaro, La Rioja, Spagna, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sancho Pérez de Ayalaは1246年にPedro Lopez de AyalaとElvira Sanchez de Gamboaの息子として生まれた。1277年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドでAldonza Díaz de Veláscuriと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1288年にスペインラ リオジャアルファロで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sancho Pérez de Ayala(은)는 1246년 Pedro Lopez de Ayala(와)과 Elvira Sanchez de Gamboa의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1277년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도에서 Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1288년 스페인 라 리오자 알파로에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sancho Pérez de Ayala nasceu em 1246 filho de Pedro Lopez de Ayala e Elvira Sanchez de Gamboa. Ele casou-se com Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri em 1277, em Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1288, em Alfaro, La Rioja, Espanha, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sancho Pérez de Ayala родился в 1246 г. Его родителей звали Pedro Lopez de Ayala и Elvira Sanchez de Gamboa. Он женился на женщине по имени Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri в 1277 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1288 г. в местности алфаро, ла риоджа, Испания в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sancho Pérez de Ayala nació en 1246 como hijo de Pedro Lopez de Ayala y Elvira Sanchez de Gamboa. Se casó con Aldonza Díaz de Veláscuri en 1277, en Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1288, en Alfaro, La Rioja, España, a la edad de 42 años.
